name: Sarah Jenkins
content: LUCID provided us with three senior React developers within two weeks. Their engineering capability and integration with our existing team was absolutely seamless. Our development velocity increased by 40%.

name: David Chen
content: The custom cloud migration strategy LUCID executed was highly professional. They minimized downtime and optimized our AWS infrastructure, saving us close to 25% in monthly hosting costs.

name: Elena Rostova
content: LUCID rebuilt our customer-facing portal using React and Node. The new app has a 98% Lighthouse performance score and has directly increased our transaction conversion rate by 18%.

name: Marcus Thompson
content: As a fast-growing startup, we needed reliable technical guidance. LUCID's IT consulting team helped us architecture our early backend and select the right technologies to scale to 100k daily users.

name: Priyah Sharma
content: Filling niche IT positions was a major bottleneck for us. LUCID's staffing service identified and screened candidates who not only possessed the technical credentials but also aligned with our collaborative culture.

name: Jean-Pierre Durand
content: The supply chain tracking dashboard developed by LUCID has significantly improved our logistics pipeline visibility. Highly responsive layouts and very solid error handling throughout.
